(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANH, SALLY

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COURT JUDGMENT ISSUED ON MARCH 11, 2019, PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON OCT-01-2020, IS DENIED. ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 15, 2020 BANH SHALL (A) PAY GHANBIAN $1,800.00 FOR THE STORAGE FEES AND (B) MUST TAKE POSSESSION OF THE PAINTING AND REMOVE IT FROM GHANBIAN'S OFFICE LOCATED AT 888 O'FARRELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109 OR INCUR $100.00 MONTHLY STORAGE FEES. DEFENDANT GHANBIAN IS THE PREVAILING PARTY AGAINST BANH ON HER CLAIM FOR ALLEGED DAMAGE TO THE PAINTING'S FRAME AS THERE IS NO EVIDENCE OF DAMAGE. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED .(506)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT GHANBIAN, ALI DBA AKA MARKETING

ORDER THE COURT AMENDS THE JUNE 25, 2021 SC-105A ORDER. THE PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PAY DEFENDANT $2,300.00 AND THE PAINTING IS DEEMED ABANDONED PER COMMISSIOENR LY'S ORDER DATED MAY 13, 2021 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

[SC-105]COURT ORDERED HEARING FILED BY ALI GHANBIAN IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SALLY BANH IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ALI GHANBIAN DBA AKA MARKETING. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE HER CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. HOWEVER, ON MAR-11-2019 THE COURT AWARDED DEFENDANT THE RIGHT TO COLLECT $100 PER MONTH STORAGE FEE BEGINNING JUN-11-2019 UP TO MAR-11-2020, WHEN PLAINTIFF CLEARLY COMMUNICATED TO DEFENDANT THAT SHE HAD ABANDONED THE ART AND WOULD NOT PICK UP THE ITEM. AS SUCH DEFENDANT IS ONLY ENTITLED TO COLLECT STORAGE FEES FOR THIS TIMEFRAME, WHICH IS $900 TOTAL. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF PAY DEFENDANT $900.00. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT GHANBIAN, ALI DBA AKA MARKETING

PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANH, SALLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GHANBIAN, ALI DBA AKA MARKETING DEFENDANT TO HOLD PAINTING AVAILABLE FOR PLAINTIFF TO PICK UP FOR NINETY DAYS (90 DAYS), THEREAFTER DEFENDANT CAN CHARGE STORAGE OF $100 PER MONTH. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF SALLY BANH IS PRESENT. MICHAEL MASON, WITNESS TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ALI GHANBIAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS TO DAMAGES TO THE PAINTING. COMMISSIONER LY WILL GO TO VIEW THE PAINTING IN PERSON AT DEFENDANTS OFFICE/WAREHOUSE. PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE FOR STORGE FEES OF $1,800.00 UP TO OCTOBER 15, 2020. 18 MONTHS OF STORAGE AT $100.00 PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PICK UP THE PAINTING BEFORE OCTOBER 15, 2020 OTHERWISE SHE WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ANOTHER MONTH OF STORGE FEES AT $100.00 A MONTH. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
